3077440.name: Turbo Lizard
3077440.description:
Go Fast! Be Rad!

Our game Turbo Lizard is a very silly 3d platforming game with inspirations from Sonic,
Goat Simulator and Skateboarding games.

Turbo Lizard is a love letter to the city of Malmö in Sweden and takes place in Folkets Park*
Where you play as an escaped lizard on a quest to free all of their friends from the pet shop.

Explore the park, meet other animals, tackle people, tackle challenges,
tackle everything really.

The more things you tackle the faster you’ll go
The faster you go the more points you get
Spend these points to unlock abilities and further the story.

*Placeholder images are from our prototype and not the final setting of the game
